playbook.intent: Sprint top-N ranked, each item is acceptance-criteria + story-pointed-ready, dependencies surfaced; the planning meeting runs in 45 minutes instead of 2 hours.
playbook.scope: Sprint top-N ranked, each item is acceptance-criteria + story-pointed-ready, dependencies surfaced; the planning meeting runs in 45 minutes instead of 2 hours.

success-criteria.criterion: Every shortlisted item has acceptance criteria

stage.name: Pre-rank
stage.intent: Bring a draft top-N before planning.

tasks.task: Trim to top N that fits realistic capacity
Note carry-over items from last sprint

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the draft list fits a realistic capacity estimate.

stage.name: Sharpen acceptance criteria
stage.intent: Every item must be AC-ready before the meeting.

tasks.task: For each item, write AC in given/when/then form
Flag items that fail an AC quality check
Send the flagged items back to refinement

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every shortlisted item has AC.

stage.name: Surface dependencies
stage.intent: Cross-team or cross-item dependencies should not surprise planning.

tasks.task: Mark cross-team dependencies on each item
Reach out to each dependency owner ahead of planning
Note any item blocked by an external dependency

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every dependency has an owner and an expected resolution date.

stage.name: Pre-size
stage.intent: Get a rough story point read before the room.

tasks.task: Walk top 5 items with the tech lead pre-meeting
Capture initial estimates as a sanity check
Re-trim the top-N if estimates blow capacity

stage.decision-gate: Advance when capacity vs estimate has a realistic margin.

stage.name: Walk-in deck
stage.intent: Show up to planning with a 1-pager.

tasks.task: Build a 1-page walk-in: goal, top-N, dependencies, risks
Send the 1-pager 24h ahead of the meeting
Open the meeting by reading the 1-pager

stage.decision-gate: Required: the planning meeting opens with the 1-pager on screen.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content sprint-planning-prep-with-engineering --format md, agent: faion get-content sprint-planning-prep-with-engineering --format context, json: faion get-content sprint-planning-prep-with-engineering --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
